string EntryAbility_desc 0x01000001
string EntryAbility_label 0x01000002
string app_name 0x01000003
string module_desc 0x01000004
string tab_chat 0x01000005
string tab_files 0x01000006
string tab_settings 0x01000007
string tab_terminal 0x01000008
color start_window_bg 0x0100000a
media app_icon 0x01000000
profile main_pages 0x01000009
